stories.headline: Nasdaq 100 Eyes Worst Day in Month as Oil Prices Soar Over $100
stories.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index tumbled, putting it on track for its worst day in a month, as doubts about the payoffs from debt-fueled artificial-intelligence spending boom dragged down big tech stocks. Oil prices pushed over $100 a barrel and bond yields rose as President Donald Trump threatened to escalate attacks in the Middle East.
